seo.title: Products | Zegendia
seo.description: Meet the Zegendia ecosystem: tailored loyalty, regional rewards fulfillment through Oh My Rewards, and PuntosPlus as loyalty software for LATAM.

hero.title: Three connected product lines to build, operate, and scale loyalty across Latin America.
hero.text: Not every company needs the same path. Some need a custom loyalty program. Others already have points and only need rewards delivery. Others want to launch fast without code. Zegendia covers all three realities.

cards.name: Zegendia Core
cards.headline: Strategic design + technology + operations
cards.description: Built for banks, telcos, retailers, B2B industries, and any program where commercial logic, integration, and regional rollout truly matter.

cards.name: Oh My Rewards
cards.headline: Your regional reward delivery engine
cards.description: For companies that already have a loyalty stack, app, or points system, but need a clean way to deliver physical and digital rewards across LATAM.
bullets: One REST API and one contract
Built for banks, fintechs, loyalty apps, and CRM rewards

cards.name: PuntosPlus
cards.headline: The loyalty operating system for LATAM
cards.description: A multi-tenant SaaS layer to launch loyalty, incentive, and engagement programs in under 30 minutes, starting at around US$29/month.
bullets: Made for SMEs and growth-stage companies

comparison.label: You need a full custom loyalty program
You already have loyalty and only need rewards fulfillment
You want to launch fast with an accessible budget

seo.title: Oh My Rewards | Rewards API for Latin America
seo.description: Oh My Rewards by Zegendia is a B2B rewards fulfillment platform for LATAM: one API, one regional catalog, tracking, support, and consolidated billing.

hero.title: Real rewards across LATAM, through one API.
hero.text: If you already run loyalty, cashback, bank rewards, CRM rewards, or internal incentives, we become your regional reward delivery engine.

pillars.title: One API, one contract, one regional catalog
pillars.text: Integrate once and avoid the operational mess of handling providers, stock, couriers, and reconciliation country by country.

pillars.title: Real operations, not just a nice catalog
pillars.text: We manage local providers, deliveries, tracking, support, retries, incidents, and monthly consolidated billing.

pillars.title: Designed for loyalty and fintech ecosystems
pillars.text: Works for banks, retailers, telcos, insurers, fintechs, loyalty apps, CRM rewards, and incentive programs.

features: Multi-country catalog with physical products, gift cards, and mobile top-ups
Dynamic catalog selection by country, category, subcategory, or brand
Points vs. USD model so your program controls its own reward economy
Tenant portal with dashboard, orders, reports, invoices, users, and roles
REST API with API Key, signed webhooks, sandbox, and OpenAPI documentation
Order tracking, operational statuses, guides, carriers, and support tickets
Monthly consolidated billing with line-by-line order detail
Real-time notifications for new orders, status changes, and alerts
Managed delivery with primary providers, backup providers, and operations monitoring
Price checker, AI categorization, duplicate detection, and image validation
Security with Row-Level Security, rotatable API keys, and change auditing
Transparent FX rates and shipping costs by country and subcategory

developerBlocks.title: For product and engineering teams
developerBlocks.text: Clean endpoints, a sandbox, webhook events, and an operating model designed for apps, banking systems, ecommerce loyalty, or CRM reward workflows.

developerBlocks.title: For operations and finance
developerBlocks.text: Consolidated billing, order-level visibility, centralized support, and better multi-country reconciliation.

cta.title: If your loyalty program already exists, we deliver the reward.
cta.text: You do not need to rebuild your program. You need a regional execution layer that can keep the redemption promise.

seo.title: PuntosPlus | Loyalty software for LATAM
seo.description: PuntosPlus is Zegendia’s loyalty operating system for launching loyalty, incentives, points, rewards, gamification, and engagement programs in LATAM without code.

hero.title: Motivate anything. Any way. Any time.
hero.text: PuntosPlus is the loyalty operating system for LATAM: a configurable engine to launch points, incentives, rewards, gamification, and engagement programs in less than 30 minutes.

highlights: B2C, B2B, channels, teams, employees, and communities

primitives.name: Audience
primitives.description: Who you want to motivate: customers, buyers, teams, employees, or partners.

primitives.name: Behavior
primitives.description: What action you want to move: buy, return, refer, learn, or sell more.

primitives.name: Currency
primitives.description: What gets accumulated: points, coins, credits, stars, or internal cashback.

primitives.name: Rule
primitives.description: How value is earned, lost, or multiplied.

primitives.name: Reward
primitives.description: What can be redeemed: physical rewards, digital rewards, perks, or benefits.

primitives.name: Control
primitives.description: What limits, approvals, and anti-fraud rules you need.

primitives.name: Experience
primitives.description: How the user lives the program: portal, app, campaigns, messaging, and gamification.

primitives.name: Measurement
primitives.description: How you know it is working: activation, redemption, repeat behavior, and ROI.

whoFor: B2C customers across retail, restaurants, gyms, and ecommerce
B2B buyers, distributors, resellers, dealers, and franchisees
Internal sales teams, external sellers, and promoters
Employees, teams, HR areas, and culture programs
Communities, referrers, influencers, allies, and affiliates

cta.title: Built from real cases, not from theory.
cta.text: PuntosPlus comes from years of operating loyalty programs across the region. That is why it does not begin as a generic app, but as a system designed for real LATAM business conditions.
